test-method.name: testSuccessfulRegistration
test-method.description: Verify a new customer can register successfully with valid details

exception.message: java.lang.RuntimeException: Failed to read Excel file: testdata/RegistrationTestData.xlsx

test-method.name: testRegistrationValidationErrors
test-method.description: Verify validation errors are shown for various invalid/incomplete submissions

test-method.name: testRegistrationWithDuplicateUsername
test-method.description: Verify registering twice with the same username shows an already-exists error

exception.message: Pre-condition failed: first registration with this username did not succeed. expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Pre-condition failed: first registration with this username did not succeed. expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at
